summary: Executed backend and frontend regression against public preview URL for Silvercore content refresh scope. All requested API/UI updates validated successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: No office/location-card artifacts found in tested pages or API payload for scoped areas.
data-testid coverage is strong for critical interactions (chat, contact, WhatsApp, team sections), supporting stable regression automation.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ contact submission via /api/contact during backend regression.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on https://cross-border-ma.preview.emergentagent.com using REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env. Verified: global coverage section, updated team names/roles with illustrated avatars (no photos), M&A Advisor naming in chat, updated disclaimer, WhatsApp CTAs (floating/contact/footer), contact emails, no office references in tested flows, and no horizontal overflow at 1920x1080.
rca of the issue: No functional defects found in this iteration. Previous brittle backend test assertion expected the exact token 'educational' in disclaimer; updated regression assertion to check required disclaimer semantics (general information + legal/tax/investment/regulatory).
test_credentials: No auth credentials required for this scope.
